title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates, Lowers '22 View
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) reports year over-year improvement in Q3 earnings reflecting higher margins in all segments.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -1.99% and 0.24%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Avery Dennison Announces Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: MENTOR, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) today announced preliminary, unaudited results for its third quarter ended October 1, 2022.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Avery Dennison's (AVY) Q3 performance is likely to reflect high demand for consumer products, growth in high-value product categories as well as benefits from productivity and cost actions.

title: Avery Dennison Announces Upcoming Investor Events
text: MENTOR, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY) today announced the following investor events: Third quarter 2022 earnings conference call on Wednesday, October 26th at 1:00 p.m. ET. The company’s third quarter news release will be issued that morning at 6:45 a.m. ET. Baird’s Global Industrial Conference on Tuesday, November 8th. Mitch Butier, chairman and chief executive officer, is scheduled to present at 11:15 a.m. ET. These events will be webcast live, and replays will be available on Avery Dennison's Investor Relations website (www.investors.averydennison.com). About Avery Dennison: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY) is a global materials science company specializing in the design and manufacture of a wide variety of labeling and functional materials. The company’s products and solutions, which are used in nearly every major industry, include pressure-sensitive materials for labels and graphic applications; tapes and other bonding solutions for industrial, medical, and retail applications; tags, labels and embellishments for apparel; and radio frequency identification (RFID) solutions serving retail apparel and other markets. The company employs approximately 36,000 employees in more than 50 countries. Reported sales in 2021 were $8.4 billion. Learn more at www.averydennison.com.
